title: Real-Time and Embedded AI Systems
shortSummary: Learn how AI interacts with firmware, control loops, and real-time safety requirements.
whyItMatters: In embodied AI, missing a deadline can matter more than missing a benchmark. This module centers the systems mindset needed for embedded and autonomy-heavy work.
coreConcepts: Model integration with firmware and control software
Observability and rollback in hardware-adjacent systems
Testing and validation in safety-critical loops
What changes when models leave the data center
